productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Tops
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with cap sleeves, graphic print on the front with mesh and pearl embellishments, and has a shorter front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash cold with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Flaunt your feminine attitude in style with this t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The graphic print of a bow on the front, coupled with mesh and pearls adds to it an ultra-feminine vibe. The longer back and shorter from hemline makes this all the more a must-have in your wardrobe. Pair this with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
